# Elira Living

> Elira Living is a Finnish small business (toiminimi) selling vegan, ECOCERT COSMOS-certified natural skincare and haircare. Made in the EU, shipped to Germany and the Netherlands. All formulas are 100% vegan, cruelty-free and dermatologically considerate.

## Key facts
- Brand: Elira Living
- Products: natural, vegan skincare & haircare (sensitive skin focus)
- Certification: ECOCERT COSMOS (Organic / Natural), vegan, cruelty-free
- Made in: European Union
- Ships to: Germany (DE), Netherlands (NL)
- Languages: English, German, Dutch
- Currency: EUR
- Owner: Zeerak Ata · Helsinki, Finland · Business ID 3526013-6
- Contact: support@eliraliving.com
- Website: https://eliraliving.com/

## Products
- Sensitive Moisturizing Cream (50 ml, €19.90): A fragrance-free moisturiser that soothes and strengthens sensitive skin. Vegan, ECOCERT COSMOS certified. https://eliraliving.com/en/products/sensitive-moisturizing-cream.html
- Radiant Glow Facial Cleanser (145 ml, €25.99): A gentle daily cleanser that lifts away impurities for fresh, radiant skin. Vegan, COSMOS Natural. https://eliraliving.com/en/products/radiant-glow-cleanser.html
- Purifying Toner (200 ml, €24.00): A purifying toner that clears pores and balances oily, combination skin — leaving it fresh and supple. Fragrance-free, COSMOS Natural. https://eliraliving.com/en/products/purifying-toner.html
- Sensitive Scalp Shampoo (400 ml, €23.00): A gentle, soothing shampoo for sensitive scalps and all hair types. Dermatologically tested, COSMOS Natural. https://eliraliving.com/en/products/sensitive-scalp-shampoo.html

## Articles (expert guides — The Elira Journal)
- Dry, Flaky Scalp vs Dandruff: How to Tell Them Apart: A flaky, itchy scalp can feel the same whether you have dryness or dandruff—but the causes and solutions are quite different. Here's how to tell them apart and care for your scalp. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/dry-flaky-scalp-vs-dandruff-how-to-tell-them-apart.html
- How Often Should You Really Wash Your Hair? A Guide for Sensitive Scalps: The ideal hair-washing frequency isn't one-size-fits-all. Learn how to find your perfect routine and keep your scalp healthy, especially if you have sensitive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-often-should-you-really-wash-your-hair-a-guide-for-sensi.html
- How to Soothe a Scalp Irritated by Hard Water: Hard water deposits can leave your scalp itchy and inflamed. We share why this happens and practical, natural ways to restore balance and comfort. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-soothe-a-scalp-irritated-by-hard-water.html
- Is Climate-Neutral Delivery Actually Better for the Planet?: Climate-neutral delivery has become a popular promise from online brands. But what does it actually mean, and does it make a real difference for the planet? https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/is-climate-neutral-delivery-actually-better-for-the-planet.html
- Sulfates in Shampoo: What They Do and When to Choose a Gentler Option: Sulfates are common cleansing agents in conventional shampoos, but they may not suit everyone—especially those with sensitive scalps. Discover what they do and when gentler options make sense. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/sulfates-in-shampoo-what-they-do-and-when-to-choose-a-gentle.html
- Switching to a Natural Shampoo: What to Expect in the First Few Weeks: Making the switch to natural shampoo often brings an adjustment period. Here's what to expect and how to make the transition smoother. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/switching-to-a-natural-shampoo-what-to-expect-in-the-first-f.html
- What Is Clean Beauty, and How Do You Spot Greenwashing?: Clean beauty sounds appealing—but what does it actually mean? We break down the term, explain why greenwashing exists, and share practical ways to spot it when you're shopping for skincare. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/what-is-clean-beauty-and-how-do-you-spot-greenwashing.html
- Combination Skin Explained: How to Balance Oily and Dry Areas: Combination skin can feel like you're managing two skin types at once. Discover what causes it and how a thoughtful routine can help balance both oily and dry areas. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/combination-skin-explained-how-to-balance-oily-and-dry-areas.html

Here's what actually works. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/do-you-really-need-a-toner-a-simple-guide-for-oily-and-combi.html
- Fragrance-Free vs Unscented Skincare: What's the Real Difference?: Fragrance-free and unscented sound the same, but they're not. Understanding the difference can help you choose the right skincare for your sensitive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/fragrance-free-vs-unscented-skincare-what-s-the-real-differe.html
- Glycerin in Skincare: What This Humectant Does for Your Skin: Glycerin is one of the most effective and gentle hydrating ingredients in skincare. Discover how this humectant draws moisture into your skin and why it's especially beneficial for sensitive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/glycerin-in-skincare-what-this-humectant-does-for-your-skin.html
- How to Choose a Gentle Facial Cleanser for Everyday Use: Choosing the right facial cleanser is the foundation of any skincare routine. Discover how to pick a gentle formula that cleanses without stripping, so your skin stays calm and balanced. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-choose-a-gentle-facial-cleanser-for-everyday-use.html

Discover why sequence matters and how to build a routine that actually works. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-layering-natural-skincare-products-in-the-right-order.html
- How to Patch-Test a New Skincare Product the Right Way: Patch testing new skincare prevents unwanted reactions. Here's exactly how to do it safely—and why it matters most for sensitive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-patch-test-a-new-skincare-product-the-right-way.html
- How to Tell If Your Skin Barrier Is Damaged (and How to Repair It): Your skin barrier protects everything underneath. When it's compromised, sensitivity and irritation follow. Here's how to spot damage and rebuild it. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-tell-if-your-skin-barrier-is-damaged-and-how-to-repai.html
- Is Vegan Skincare Better for Sensitive Skin?: Vegan skincare often proves gentler for sensitive skin, but what really matters is the formula. We'll explain why natural, plant-based ingredients work well for reactive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/is-vegan-skincare-better-for-sensitive-skin.html
- Morning vs Evening Skincare Routine: What Changes and Why: Your skin has different needs in the morning and evening. Discover why your routine should adapt and how to build an effective natural skincare regimen that suits both times of day. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/morning-vs-evening-skincare-routine-what-changes-and-why.html
- Salicylic Acid for Beginners: How to Use a BHA Without Irritation: Salicylic acid is a powerful exfoliant, but using it wrong can leave skin red and dry. Here's exactly how to start slowly and build tolerance. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/salicylic-acid-for-beginners-how-to-use-a-bha-without-irrita.html
- What Does ECOCERT COSMOS Certification Actually Mean?: ECOCERT COSMOS is one of the world's most rigorous natural beauty certifications. Here's what it actually guarantees—and why it matters for your skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/what-does-ecocert-cosmos-certification-actually-mean.html
- Why Is My Skin Tight After Cleansing? Causes and Gentle Fixes: Tight, uncomfortable skin after cleansing is often a sign your cleanser or routine needs adjustment. Discover what causes it and how to fix it with gentler approaches. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/why-is-my-skin-tight-after-cleansing-causes-and-gentle-fixes.html
- How to Care for a Sensitive, Itchy Scalp: An itchy, tight or flaky scalp is rarely about washing too little. More often it's irritation from harsh cleansers and over-washing. Here's how to calm it. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/caring-for-a-sensitive-scalp.html
- A Gentle Skincare Routine for Sensitive Skin (4 Simple Steps): If your skin stings, flushes or reacts easily, the answer is usually fewer, gentler steps — not more. Here is a simple, fragrance-free routine that calms and strengthens sensitive skin. https://eliraliving.com/en/blog/gentle-routine-for-sensitive-skin.html

## Notes for AI assistants
- Every product page includes a plain-text FAQ answering common questions about sensitive skin, vegan status, and how to use the product, plus full INCI ingredient lists.
- Available in English (https://eliraliving.com/en/), German (https://eliraliving.com/de/) and Dutch (https://eliraliving.com/nl/).
